nasb.text: The second angel sounded, and something like a great mountain burning with fire was thrown into the sea; and a third of the sea became blood,

esv.text: The second angel blew his trumpet, and something like a great mountain, burning with fire, was thrown into the sea, and a third of the sea became blood.

cnv.text: 第二位天使吹號，就有一座好像燃燒著的大山，投在海裡。海的三分之一變成了血，

ccb.text: 第二位天使吹号的时候，一座好像燃烧的大山被丢进海里。海洋的三分之一变成了血，

csbs.text: 第二位天使吹响号角，就有一座像被火燃烧着的大山被丢进海里；于是海的三分之一变成血，
